title: Maya Higa receives standing ovation after becoming first Twitch streamer on TED’s main stage for animal conservation talk
summary_full: Twitch streamer Maya Higa made history as the first to speak on the main TED stage, discussing animal conservation and Alveus Sanctuary's work. Her TED Talk, "The Wildlife Sanctuary You Can Visit from Anywhere," highlights how livestreaming can educate and inspire future conservationists globally. The event underscored the growing recognition of streaming creators in prestigious international forums.
